chapter_title: What was said about Embracing and Kissing

hadith_entries.text:
458. Narrated A'isha : Zayd ibn Haretha came to Madina.
The Messenger of Allah was in my house at that time. Zayd
knocked at the door and the Messenger of Allah rose up
and went to receive him naked, dragging his (outer) garment.
He embraced and kissed him.' A'isha said: 'By Allah, I never
saw the Messenger of Allah naked (while receiving a man)
after or before this."
8 Naked here means covering the Awra, but not wearing an outer
garment. This shows pleasure and love of the Messenger of Allah
for Zayd's arrival.
B
